title: 9 Pcs Universal Zipper Repairer,3 Sizes Zipper Repair Kit, Removable Universal Zip Puller Replacement,for Different Sizes of Clothes,Jeans,Backpacks,Wallets,Luggage,Suitcases (Black)
features: Three Versatile Sizes – Comes with 9 pieces in 3 different sizes, suitable for various zip types including jackets, jeans, backpacks, wallets, handbags, suitcases and more. Perfect for household or travel emergencies.
Tool-Free & Quick Installation – No sewing or special tools required. Simply clip on and secure in seconds, making it ideal for anyone needing a fast zip fix on the go.
Durable & Reusable Design – Made from premium-quality plastic and metal materials, these zip pullers are built to last and can be reused multiple times without losing their grip or effectiveness.
Universal Fit Compatibility – Designed to fit a wide range of standard zippers, whether for clothing or accessories. A practical and reliable alternative to replacing entire zips.
Compact & Travel-Friendly Kit – Lightweight and easy to store in drawers, sewing kits or travel bags. A must-have repair accessory for home use, camping, or extended travel.
description: Restore the functionality of your favourite garments and accessories with our 9 Pcs Zipper Puller Replacement Kit. Designed for convenience, durability and versatility, this zip repair solution includes three different sizes to accommodate a wide variety of zippers – from clothing and jeans to backpacks, wallets, luggage and suitcases. Made from high-quality, sturdy plastic and metal components, each puller is engineered for long-lasting use and easy grip. The removable and reusable design makes installation quick and tool-free – no sewing required. Whether you’re fixing a broken slider on your favourite jacket or replacing a damaged pull tab on your travel bag, this universal zip puller kit is an essential addition to your home DIY repair toolkit. Keep one in your drawer, travel case, or sewing kit and say goodbye to costly replacements.
